task_updates.executor_notes: Created `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineData.types.ts`, moved `UseTimelineDataResult` into the shared types module, re-exported `SaveStatus`, `RenderStatus`, `ClipTab`, and `EditorPreferences` there, and dropped the unused `shouldAcceptPolledData` re-export from `useTimelineData.ts`. Updated the planned importer sites to use `useTimelineData.types.ts`, including replacing `ReturnType<typeof useTimelineData>` with the explicit `UseTimelineDataResult` type in `useTimelineState.types.ts`. Verification: `cd /Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app && npx tsc --noEmit` passed cleanly.

Updated `resolveOverlaps` to return `adjustments`, updated `resolveGroupOverlaps` to return `{ rows, metaPatches }`, and propagated overlap meta patches through `applyMultiDragMoves` using per-clip spread merge so cross-track `track` updates and overlap-derived `from`/`to` changes accumulate together. Updated callers to destructure the new overlap result shape and added `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/__tests__/resolve-overlaps.test.ts` covering `resolveOverlaps`, `resolveGroupOverlaps`, and multi-drag patch accumulation. Verification: `cd /Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app && npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/` passed with 22 files / 69 tests, and `cd /Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app && npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed. The shared types now live in `useTimelineData.types.ts`, the planned importer sites now reference that module instead of `useTimelineData.ts`, and the old `ReturnType<typeof useTimelineData>` alias was replaced with the explicit `UseTimelineDataResult` type. `cd /Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app && npx tsc --noEmit` passed cleanly.

Confirmed. `resolveGroupOverlaps` now returns `metaPatches`, `applyMultiDragMoves` accumulates overlap patches across loop iterations with per-clip spread merge so existing `track` patches are preserved, and new direct tests were added for both `resolveOverlaps` and `resolveGroupOverlaps` in `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/__tests__/resolve-overlaps.test.ts`. The full video-editor Vitest module passed after the change.
